subcodes.first_line: O son of the Kingdom! Mr. Wilhelm had permission to attain the presence one year ago. Now wisdom requireth [3.5s]... ...Regarding the eating of animal flesh and abstinence therefrom, know thou of a certainty that, in the beginning of creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابن ملکوت جناب مستر ویلهم از یکسال پیش اجازه حضور داشت حال حکمت مقتضی
subcodes.subjects: @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @personal instructions, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
